message:
chore: integrate pending improvements (toon crate, export hooks, tests)

Batch commit of pending improvements from multiple agents:
- Cargo.toml: vergen-gix 9.1.0, toon crate as direct dependency
- robot.rs: real TOON output via toon crate (was tru subprocess)
- export_pages.rs: hook integration for HTML exports
- loader.rs: workspace watch path resolution
- Various analysis module cleanups and test additions
- All 626 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
